Group_1_Lower_Class.description: Dollar amounts owed by delinquent credit card customers from the lower socioeconomic class (Group 1). This variable, along with Group_2_Middle_Class and Group_3_Upper_Class, represents the same measured outcome (dollars owed) split by the socioeconomic class grouping factor.

Group_2_Middle_Class.description: Dollar amounts owed by delinquent credit card customers from the middle socioeconomic class (Group 2). This variable, along with Group_1_Lower_Class and Group_3_Upper_Class, represents the same measured outcome (dollars owed) split by the socioeconomic class grouping factor.

Group_3_Upper_Class.description: Dollar amounts owed by delinquent credit card customers from the upper socioeconomic class (Group 3). This variable, along with Group_1_Lower_Class and Group_2_Middle_Class, represents the same measured outcome (dollars owed) split by the socioeconomic class grouping factor.
